title: Australia sues Amazon for making allegedly unfair contracts with subscribers
abstract: Have you heard about Amazon being sued by Australia? Not for selling books, but for allegedly unfair contracts with subscribers! The Australian government has stepped in to say "Let's talk," as this "subscription contract battle" is about to unfold. Come and watch who will come out on top!
abstract_zh: 你听说过亚马逊被澳洲起诉了吗？不是因为卖书，而是因为它跟用户签的合同太不公平了！这回澳政府直接站出来，说“咱们得谈谈”，这场“订阅合同保卫战”即将上演。来围观吧，看看谁会笑到最后！
